creator: ikkyisaacs@gmail.com
text:
Add note to 7.2.1.2. Firefox and Adobe® Flash® Plugin documentation.
Under step 1 'Install the www/nspluginwrapper' add a note referring to the  emulators/linux_base-f10 port dependency on the linux kernel module. eg 

This port requires emulators/linux_base-f10 which is a large port depending on the linux kernel module and linux emulation services.

Automate the loading of the linux module in /boot/loader.conf with 
  linux_load="YES"
and the linux services in /etc/rc.conf with
  linux_enable="YES"
